ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "expt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "expt_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "expt_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "expt_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "expt_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., growth, division, differentiation) */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cells used in the experiment */,
  "experimental_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed experimental conditions in JSON format */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "expt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the well belongs to */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well (e.g., C06, D07) */,
  "well_description" TEXT /* Description of the well */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., 6-well, 24-well) */,
  "medium_used" TEXT /* Medium used in the well */,
  "initial_cell_count" INTEGER /* Initial number of cells in the well */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the well was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the well was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_expt_id FOREIGN KEY ("expt_id") REFERENCES experiments ("expt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colonies" (
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each colony */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the colony belongs to */,
  "colony_name" TEXT /* Name of the colony (e.g., L, A) */,
  "colony_description" TEXT /* Description of the colony */,
  "colony_type" TEXT /* Type of colony (e.g., single-cell, multi-cell) */,
  "initial_cell_count" INTEGER /* Initial number of cells in the colony */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the colony */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the colony was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the colony was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("colony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colonies_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_data" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell data point */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony the cell data belongs to */,
  "expt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the cell data belongs to */,
  "time_point" INTEGER /* Time point at which the cell data was collected */,
  "fucci" INTEGER /* FUCCI value at the time point */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Cell count at the time point */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell (e.g., stem cell, differentiated cell) */,
  "cell_size" REAL /* Size of the cell */,
  "cell_morphology" TEXT /* Morphology of the cell */,
  "cell_health" TEXT /* Health status of the cell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cell data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cell data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_data_colony_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_data_expt_id FOREIGN KEY ("expt_id") REFERENCES experiments ("expt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_points" (
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "expt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the time point belongs to */,
  "time_point" INTEGER /* Time point at which cell data was collected */,
  "time_point_description" TEXT /* Description of the time point */,
  "time_point_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the time point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the time point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the time point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_points_expt_id FOREIGN KEY ("expt_id") REFERENCES experiments ("expt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fucci_values" (
  "fucci_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FUCCI value */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell data point the FUCCI value belongs to */,
  "fucci_value" INTEGER /* FUCCI value at the time point */,
  "fucci_measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of FUCCI measurement (e.g., fluorescence, absorbance) */,
  "fucci_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for FUCCI values */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the FUCCI value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the FUCCI value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fucci_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fucci_values_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_data ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_counts" (
  "cell_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell count */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell data point the cell count belongs to */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Cell count at the time point */,
  "cell_count_method" TEXT /* Method used to count cells (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "cell_count_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the cell count */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cell count was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cell count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_counts_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_data ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "researcher_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the researcher */,
  "researcher_department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimenter" (
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimenter */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher the experimenter belongs to */,
  "expt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the experimenter belongs to */,
  "experimenter_role" TEXT /* Role of the experimenter (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "experimenter_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the experimenter */,
  "experimenter_department" TEXT /* Department the experimenter belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experimenter was added to the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experimenter's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimenter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimenter_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimenter_expt_id FOREIGN KEY ("expt_id") REFERENCES experiments ("expt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "expt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_expt_id FOREIGN KEY ("expt_id") REFERENCES experiments ("expt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "expt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_expt_id FOREIGN KEY ("expt_id") REFERENCES experiments ("expt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
